statement: In every magma, Equation 2957 (`x = ((y * (y * z)) * x) * y`) implies Equation 200 (`x = (y * z) * (w * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0154
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op y z)) x) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w z))
